violations.text: The handsink was observed to be inoperable. Owner informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

Cleaned and sanitized utensils were observed being stored between the wall and 3 bay sink. Owner informed to sanitized all utensils and install an additional utensil magnet. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
Parts of the ceiling in (basement) prep areas are exposed wood and wires. Approved material needed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
